title: ophrys lutea subsp. funerea
intro: Ophrys lutea subsp. funerea, also known as the Funereal Bee Orchid, is a subspecies of orchid found in the Mediterranean region, characterized by its unique flower shape and yellow coloration. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The Funereal Bee Orchid has been associated with several health benefits, including wound healing, pain relief, and the reduction of fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
